query: Find 10 parcels in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the municipality using kommunenummer filter

3.description: get 200-year storm-flood polygons intersecting the municipality extent (will use municipality EWKT from step 1 in the SQL)

4.description: find parcels that intersect the 200-year storm-flood polygons

5.description: deduplicate to one row per teig (group by teigid and retain identifying columns)

args.sql:
SELECT id, ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna s
WHERE ST_Intersects(s.omrade, (
  SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
  WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%'
  LIMIT 1
));

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT objid, teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, ST_AsEWKT(omrade) AS omrade_ewkt
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
WITH k AS (
  SELECT ST_Transform(omrade, 25833) AS omrade_geom
  FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
  WHERE false
)
SELECT 1;
